name: Don Thompson
abstract: Donald Winston Thompson, OC (born 18 January 1940) is a Canadian jazz musician who plays double bass, piano, and vibes. Thompson's career as a performer, recording artist, producer, session musician, and music educator has lasted for more than 50 years.

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: I did Colors at Banff the same week I did Stowell and Don Thompson... Here’s another record I like a lot, that you did at Banff with John Stowell and Don Thompson.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Jake Hanna
about_quotes.evidence: She says, 'Oh I’m going to Canada and study with Don Thompson.' ... I said, 'Well right, this guy’s a genius.'
about_quotes.doc_title: Jake Hanna interviewed by Monk Rowe, Aspen, Colorado, October 11, 1997
